en.name: Schwab Appreciation Bonus
en.description: Receive a $100 or $200 statement credit annually if your qualifying Schwab holdings are $250,000 or $1,000,000+, respectively.

activationInstructions: Unlock based on Charles Schwab qualifying asset balance ($250k for $100 / $1M for $200) measured on the last business day of the month before your anniversary.
